info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  'glE snA van vam' ete DAtavaH upasargasya anupasTitO anena gaRasUtreRa vikalpena 'mitaH' (yezu makAraH itsaMjYakaH asti tAdfSaH) viDIyante  atra 'glE' taTA 'snA' etayoH vizaye pUrvaM mittvaM nEva prAptam tad idAnIM viDIyate  anyayoH dvayoH vizaye tu pUrvaM nityaM prAptaM mittvaM vikalpyate  ataH iyam uBayaviBAzA  mittvasya PalaM tu mitAM hrasvaH 6.4.92 iti Ric-pratyaye pare aNgasya upaDAvarRasya hrasvAdeSaH - iti  yaTA jvalayati/jvAlayati - AdayaH
